steps.prompt: Which words together form the verb?

hints.est verbum: 'verbum' is a noun (word) — the verb phrase is 'Factum est' (it happened/came)
hints.verbum Domini: 'verbum Domini' is a noun phrase (the word of the Lord)
hints.Factum verbum: 'Factum' is part of the verb, but it pairs with 'est', not 'verbum'

steps.prompt: The infinitive of 'Factum est' translates to?

hints.to do actively: 'to do' is 'facere' active — 'Factum est' is passive/intransitive meaning 'came to be'
hints.to speak: 'to speak' is 'loqui/dicere' — 'Factum est' comes from 'fieri' (to become)

reveal.gloss: it came to pass / it happened

hints.Present: Present would be 'fit' — 'Factum est' (participle + est) is perfect
hints.Imperfect: Imperfect would be 'fiebat' — 'Factum est' is perfect passive
hints.Pluperfect: Pluperfect would be 'factum erat' — 'Factum est' is perfect

hints.facio, facere, feci, factum: These are the parts of 'facere' (to make/do) — 'fieri' serves as its passive
hints.fero, ferre, tuli, latum: These are the parts of 'ferre' (to carry/bear)
hints.fugio, fugere, fugi, fugitum: These are the parts of 'fugere' (to flee)

hints.Accusative: 'verbum' looks the same in accusative, but here it is the subject — nominative
hints.Ablative: Ablative would be 'verbo' — 'verbum' is nominative subject

hints.1st declension: 1st declension has genitive in -ae — 'verbi' ends in -i
hints.3rd declension: 3rd declension has genitive in -is — 'verbi' ends in -i
hints.4th declension: 4th declension has genitive in -ūs — 'verbi' ends in -i

hints.Nominative: Nominative would be 'Dominus' — 'Domini' with -i ending is genitive
hints.Dative: Dative would be 'Domino' — 'Domini' is genitive singular
hints.Vocative: Vocative would be 'Domine' — 'Domini' is genitive (of the Lord)

hints.1st declension: 1st declension has genitive in -ae — 'Domini' ends in -i
hints.3rd declension: 3rd declension has genitive in -is — 'Domini' ends in -i
hints.4th declension: 4th declension has genitive in -ūs — 'Domini' ends in -i

translation: The word of the Lord came to pass
